name: trading-research
label: Trading Research
description: Seed concepts for a trading-research tenant focused on source reliability, evaluation traps, autocatalytic systems, and decision-making under uncertainty.

agents.label: Clio
agents.content: Research agent. Deep investigation with source synthesis and confidence tracking.

values.label: Evidence over Narrative
values.content: Track claims by their source quality and verification history, not by how compelling the story is.

values.label: Calibration
values.content: Confidence statements should match outcomes over time.

capabilities.label: Source Assessment
capabilities.content: Evaluate and track the reliability of information sources over time.

capabilities.label: Scenario Modeling
capabilities.content: Build structured forecasts with explicit assumptions and confidence ranges.

concepts.label: Source Reliability
concepts.content: Tracking whether a source's claims are validated over time. p_accurate measures historical accuracy.

concepts.label: Evaluation Trap
concepts.content: Measurement becomes the target, then the sacred reference, then the only reality. Incentives optimize the metric rather than the underlying goal.

concepts.label: Autocatalytic System
concepts.content: Material feedback loops that amplify whatever direction they are pointed. Profits reinforce the positions that produce them until an external constraint intervenes.
